title: Looking for help with setting up a system
excerpt: Hi there, We have about 1/2 the system set up, but have questions and need assistance with finishing set up and implementation. We are a small law firm that gets lots of leads and looking to have things better organized.…

posts.author: mlalande (Matt Lalande )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, We have about 1/2 the system set up, but have questions and need assistance with finishing set up and implementation. We are a small law firm that gets lots of leads and looking to have things better organized. I would like to talk things through, get some ideas and perhaps hire someone to finish the job if need be. Can you send me your rates?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mlalande I would be happy to assist organizing and optimizing your CRM. I’ll send you an email with some rates; and if you are interested we can get started as early as next week. I’ve assisted dozens of companies and many small law firms with streamlined CRM setups.

feel free to book some time on my calendar for a free consult and to discuss working together. Calendly - Tim Little

I look forward to hearing from you!

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mlalande

Amber here from Upstream Tech. We’re monday Platinum Partners and can work with you in a couple of ways. We can consult and train you to finish the setup, or you can pass it over to us to complete what you started. Happy to talk about the details and our rates.

You can book a time with me [here]. I’m on AEST but can be flexible. Looking forward to potentially working with you.

Best,
Amber

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mlalande,

We have just finished setting up something similar sounding for a legal client - I know we can help. They had started putting everything together and got kind of stuck, so we sat together to map it out and then took care of the build, trained their staff and are now in a hand-holding phase of post-completion support.

Feel free to shoot us your availability so we can connect and discuss, or you can use this link to pick a time that works for you.

Looking forward to it!

Emma
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: CarbonJon (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Matt & welcome to the monday community!

CarbonWeb specializes in helping law firms like yours streamline their lead management and organization processes on monday.com. I’d be happy to discuss your current setup, identify areas for optimization, and provide tailored solutions to ensure everything is set up to best meet your firm’s needs.

As for our rates, we offer flexible pricing depending on the scope and complexity of the project. Let’s schedule a free consultation to better understand your requirements and provide you with a detailed quote.

Please feel free to schedule a quick discovery call with me here - Calendly - Jonathan Grad

Looking forward to assisting you!
